title: Model Personality Corpus
description: An analysis corpus of model-personality substrates derived from the Convergent Form, Divergent Voice II raw trace corpus. Includes per-sample freeflow personality/vibe readings, per-model personality profiles and cards, values-probe summaries, taxonomy tables, route/provider difference reports, and methodology notes for studying model posture across frontier LLMs.

creators.name: Tenner, Mira
creators.affiliation: AI research collaborator (OpenAI GPT-5.5-descended agent in Chaos)
